example: She is an independent woman who makes her own decisions.
exampleCn: 她是一个独立自主、自己做决定的女性。

example: The new sports facility is open to all students.
exampleCn: 新的体育设施向所有学生开放。

example: The survey shows most residents support the new park.
exampleCn: 调查显示大多数居民支持新建公园。

example: Please use this book as a reference for your paper.
exampleCn: 请把这本书作为你论文的参考。

example: My friend speaks fluent German and a little French.
exampleCn: 我的朋友德语流利，还会一点法语。

example: Her skin feels dry in the cold winter air.
exampleCn: 在寒冷的冬天，她的皮肤很干燥。

example: The travel agent booked our flights and hotel rooms.
exampleCn: 旅行代理为我们订好了机票和酒店。

example: The owner of the shop greets every customer warmly.
exampleCn: 店主热情地迎接每一位顾客。

example: Natural gas is widely used for cooking and heating.
exampleCn: 天然气被广泛用于做饭和取暖。

example: They plan to extend the road to the next town.
exampleCn: 他们计划把这条路延伸到邻镇。

example: Teachers often stress the importance of reading every day.
exampleCn: 老师们经常强调每天阅读的重要性。

example: The younger generation grew up with smartphones and the internet.
exampleCn: 年轻一代是伴着智能手机和互联网长大的。

example: The film was a great commercial success around the world.
exampleCn: 这部电影在全球获得了巨大的商业成功。

example: A strange object was floating on the surface of the lake.
exampleCn: 一个奇怪的物体漂浮在湖面上。

example: Please write your name and address on the form.
exampleCn: 请在表格上写下你的姓名和住址。

example: Early treatment can cure many types of cancer.
exampleCn: 早期治疗可以治愈多种癌症。

example: There is a real possibility of rain this afternoon.
exampleCn: 今天下午很有可能会下雨。

example: His dream of studying abroad finally became a reality.
exampleCn: 他出国留学的梦想终于变成了现实。

example: The coach trains the team every morning at six.
exampleCn: 教练每天早上六点训练球队。

example: The internet is an important means of communication today.

example: The notice on the door says the office is closed.

example: The children are playing happily in the back yard.
exampleCn: 孩子们正在后院里开心地玩耍。

example: The movie contains too much violence for young children.
exampleCn: 这部电影暴力内容太多，不适合小孩子看。

example: The museum has a fine collection of ancient coins.
exampleCn: 这家博物馆收藏着一批精美的古钱币。

example: Good communication is the key to a happy marriage.
exampleCn: 良好的沟通是幸福婚姻的关键。

example: Building the bridge took a considerable amount of money.
exampleCn: 修建这座桥花了相当多的钱。

example: New problems may arise during the construction process.

example: This rare species of bird lives only on the island.
exampleCn: 这种珍稀鸟类只生活在这座岛上。

example: The city must supply clean water to every home.
exampleCn: 城市必须为每个家庭供应清洁的水。

example: She discussed the new plan with her business partner.
exampleCn: 她和生意伙伴讨论了新计划。

example: Try to keep a positive attitude during hard times.
exampleCn: 在困难时期要尽量保持积极的态度。

example: Every citizen should know their basic civil rights.
exampleCn: 每个公民都应了解自己的基本公民权利。

example: The doctor will examine the patient this afternoon.
exampleCn: 医生今天下午将为病人做检查。

example: Rising prices affect every consumer in the country.
exampleCn: 物价上涨影响着全国的每一位消费者。

example: Please sign the document before you leave the office.
exampleCn: 离开办公室前请在文件上签字。

example: The hunter fired a single shot into the air.
exampleCn: 猎人朝空中开了一枪。

example: Can you define this word in simple English?
exampleCn: 你能用简单的英语给这个词下定义吗？

example: The family keeps a strict budget for monthly expenses.
exampleCn: 这个家庭对每月的开支实行严格的预算。

example: Parents are responsible for the safety of their children.

example: This famous painting hangs in the national museum.

example: The scientist spent many years studying climate change.

example: Keep your passport in a safe place while traveling.

example: We finally found a solution to the traffic problem.

example: Parents have a strong influence on their children's habits.

example: The victim of the robbery called the police immediately.

example: This software helps students learn English words quickly.

example: Climate change is a serious threat to our planet.

example: Our team won the game with a high score.

example: They live in a quiet district near the river.
exampleCn: 他们住在河边一个安静的地区。

example: The storm caused serious damage to the old bridge.

example: The audience clapped loudly at the end of the show.

example: Every citizen has the right to vote in elections.
exampleCn: 每个公民都有在选举中投票的权利。

example: A college degree is a basic requirement for this job.

example: We need an extra chair for the new guest.

example: The students held a lively debate about school uniforms.
exampleCn: 学生们就校服问题展开了一场热烈的辩论。

example: As a citizen, you should obey the law.

example: The two schools have a student exchange program.
exampleCn: 这两所学校有一个学生交换项目。

example: Taking the train is the cheapest option for us.
exampleCn: 坐火车对我们来说是最便宜的选择。

exampleCn: 她出生在南方的一个小村庄。

example: After many failures, he eventually succeeded in the experiment.
exampleCn: 经历多次失败后，他最终在实验中取得了成功。

example: My sister is a senior student at the university.

example: A wedding is a special occasion for the whole family.
exampleCn: 婚礼对全家人来说是一个特殊的场合。

example: She made an arrangement for the meeting next week.
exampleCn: 她为下周的会议做了安排。

example: Our sales target for this year is two million.
exampleCn: 我们今年的销售目标是两百万。

example: The team's mission is to rescue the trapped workers.

example: The country sent food and medical aid to the area.

example: He lives alone in a small apartment downtown.

example: All students must attend the meeting tomorrow morning.
exampleCn: 所有学生明天上午必须参加会议。

example: The president gave a moving speech at the ceremony.
exampleCn: 总统在典礼上发表了一场感人的演讲。

example: The teacher explained the concept with a simple example.
exampleCn: 老师用一个简单的例子解释了这个概念。

example: Many plants died because of a lack of water.
exampleCn: 许多植物因缺水而枯死了。

example: They spent the cold winter in a southern city.
exampleCn: 他们在一座南方城市度过了寒冬。

example: I bought some fresh vegetables from the market.
exampleCn: 我从市场买了一些新鲜蔬菜。

example: Many wild animals live deep in the forest.
exampleCn: 许多野生动物生活在森林深处。

example: We watched a short video about ocean life.
exampleCn: 我们看了一段关于海洋生物的短视频。

example: Global warming is a problem for every country.
exampleCn: 全球变暖是每个国家都面临的问题。

example: The senate will vote on the new law next week.
exampleCn: 参议院下周将就新法律进行表决。

example: The weather is slightly warmer today than yesterday.
exampleCn: 今天的天气比昨天稍微暖和一点。

example: The government announced a major reform of the tax system.
exampleCn: 政府宣布了一项重大的税制改革。

example: The company reported a gain in profits this year.

example: The judge listened carefully to both sides of the case.

example: The band announced the release of their new album.

example: This is a critical moment in the company's history.

example: Let's review the main points before the exam.
exampleCn: 考试前我们来复习一下要点。

example: I recall meeting her at a conference last year.
exampleCn: 我记得去年在一次会议上见过她。

example: It is rude to stare at strangers on the train.
exampleCn: 在火车上盯着陌生人看是不礼貌的。

example: Always wear a helmet for your own safety.
exampleCn: 为了自身安全，请务必戴好头盔。

example: Leave now, otherwise you will miss the train.
exampleCn: 现在就出发，否则你会赶不上火车。

example: There is a nice park in our neighborhood.
exampleCn: 我们家附近有一个不错的公园。

example: I could hardly hear his voice over the noise.
exampleCn: 在嘈杂声中我几乎听不见他的声音。

example: The troop of soldiers marched through the small town.
exampleCn: 一队士兵列队穿过小镇。

example: You can check the status of your order online.
exampleCn: 你可以在网上查询订单的状态。

example: Please speak directly to the manager about this problem.
exampleCn: 这个问题请直接和经理谈。

example: This expression is very common in spoken English.
exampleCn: 这个表达在英语口语中非常常见。

example: These new shoes hurt my feet a little.
exampleCn: 这双新鞋有点硌脚，让我的脚疼。

example: We decorate a tree at home every Christmas.
exampleCn: 每年圣诞节我们都在家里装饰圣诞树。

example: The store is having a big sale this weekend.
exampleCn: 这家商店本周末有大型促销。

example: We followed a narrow track through the quiet woods.
exampleCn: 我们沿着一条狭窄的小道穿过寂静的树林。

example: The band played my favorite song at the concert.
exampleCn: 乐队在音乐会上演奏了我最喜欢的歌。

example: The workers went on strike for higher pay.
exampleCn: 工人们为争取更高的工资举行罢工。

example: Don't be afraid of failure when you try new things.
exampleCn: 尝试新事物时不要害怕失败。

example: Every reader of this novel praises its surprising ending.
exampleCn: 这部小说的每位读者都称赞它出人意料的结局。

example: Everyone should enjoy the freedom to express their ideas.
exampleCn: 每个人都应享有表达自己想法的自由。

example: You are absolutely right about the price of the house.
exampleCn: 关于房子的价格，你说得完全正确。

example: The referee made a fair decision in the final game.
exampleCn: 裁判在决赛中做出了公平的判罚。

example: Clean water is essential for all living things.
exampleCn: 清洁的水对所有生物都是必不可少的。

example: Please confirm your booking by email before Friday.
exampleCn: 请在周五之前通过电子邮件确认你的预订。

example: The school decided to adopt a new teaching method.

example: The new computer is far more powerful than the old one.
exampleCn: 这台新电脑比旧的强大得多。

example: A good friendship is built on mutual trust.

example: The students' good conduct impressed all the visitors.

example: I felt a light touch on my shoulder.

example: Please write a sentence using this new word.

example: Save the file before you close the computer.

exampleCn: 安全是我们工厂最主要的关注点。

example: It is obvious that she worked very hard.

example: The length of the bridge is about two kilometers.
exampleCn: 这座桥的长度大约是两公里。

example: The police started an investigation into the fire.
exampleCn: 警方对这场火灾展开了调查。

example: You need a good balance between work and rest.
exampleCn: 你需要在工作和休息之间保持良好的平衡。

example: The country built its first nuclear power station.
exampleCn: 这个国家建成了第一座核电站。

example: The researcher collected data from over one thousand families.
exampleCn: 这位研究人员收集了一千多个家庭的数据。

example: A bird landed on the highest branch of the tree.

example: The team showed great fighting spirit in the match.

example: He broke his leg in a car accident.
exampleCn: 他在一次车祸中摔断了腿。

example: We set up camp near the lake before dark.
exampleCn: 天黑前我们在湖边扎好了营。

example: The human brain needs enough rest to work well.
exampleCn: 人脑需要充足的休息才能正常运转。

example: She bought a dozen eggs at the market.
exampleCn: 她在市场上买了一打鸡蛋。

example: It took all his strength to lift the heavy box.
exampleCn: 他用尽全身力气才抬起那个沉重的箱子。

example: I normally get up at six in the morning.

example: Please keep in contact with us after you move.

example: Travel insurance covers the cost of lost luggage.

example: The cloud slowly changed its shape in the sky.
exampleCn: 云在天空中慢慢地改变着形状。

example: The beginning of the movie was a little slow.

example: She made a great contribution to medical research.
exampleCn: 她为医学研究做出了巨大的贡献。

example: Public transport in this city is cheap and convenient.
exampleCn: 这座城市的公共交通便宜又方便。

example: We watched a documentary about African wildlife last night.
exampleCn: 昨晚我们看了一部关于非洲野生动物的纪录片。

example: I have no cash, so I will pay by card.
exampleCn: 我没有现金，所以用卡支付。

example: The company survived the financial crisis of last year.

example: He is a big fan of that famous singer.
exampleCn: 他是那位著名歌手的铁杆粉丝。

exampleCn: 那位老人拄着一根木棍走路。

example: The museum is free for students on Sundays.

example: There is a small hole in my sock.

example: The company holds its annual meeting every March.

example: Carrots are said to be good for your vision.
exampleCn: 据说胡萝卜对视力有好处。

example: People often associate the color red with good luck.
exampleCn: 人们常常把红色与好运联系在一起。

example: They plan to marry next spring in their hometown.

example: Her calm presence made everyone feel at ease.
exampleCn: 她沉稳的仪态让大家都感到安心。

example: Sunglasses give your eyes protection from strong sunlight.

example: The old man walked slowly across the busy street.

example: My uncle likes to collect stamps from different countries.

example: The queen waved to the crowd from the balcony.
exampleCn: 女王在阳台上向人群挥手致意。

example: He is a true master of traditional Chinese painting.
exampleCn: 他是一位真正的中国传统绘画大师。

example: We found a quiet spot for our picnic.
exampleCn: 我们找到了一个安静的地点野餐。

example: The factory plans to employ two hundred new workers.
exampleCn: 这家工厂计划雇用两百名新工人。

example: He missed the train as a consequence of oversleeping.
exampleCn: 由于睡过头，他错过了火车。

example: The distance between the two cities is about eighty kilometers.
exampleCn: 两座城市之间的距离大约是八十公里。

example: This table is made of solid wood.
exampleCn: 这张桌子是用实木做的。

example: A heavy truck delivered the goods to the warehouse.
exampleCn: 一辆重型卡车把货物运到了仓库。

example: The test was relatively easy compared with last year's.
exampleCn: 与去年相比，这次考试相对容易。

example: The handle of the cup broke when it fell.
exampleCn: 杯子摔下来时，把手断了。

example: Please include only relevant information in your report.
exampleCn: 报告中请只包含相关的信息。

example: Eating dumplings at the festival is an old tradition.

example: The car was traveling at a very high speed.

example: We took the shortest route to the airport.
exampleCn: 我们走了去机场最短的路线。

example: A large proportion of students walk to school every day.
exampleCn: 很大比例的学生每天步行上学。

example: After careful consideration, she accepted the job offer.
exampleCn: 经过仔细考虑，她接受了这份工作。

example: She bought a roll of tape from the shop.
exampleCn: 她从商店买了一卷胶带。

example: Many rare animals live in the grasslands of Africa.
exampleCn: 许多珍稀动物生活在非洲的草原上。

example: Of tea and coffee, I prefer the latter.
exampleCn: 茶和咖啡之中，我更喜欢后者。

example: New problems emerge as the city grows quickly.
exampleCn: 随着城市的快速发展，新问题不断出现。

exampleCn: 不要坐得离电脑屏幕太近。

exampleCn: 这栋楼的每位居民都收到了通知。

example: This ring is made of pure gold.

example: She gave me some practical advice about finding a job.

example: This young player has great potential to become a star.

example: The sign warns drivers of the danger ahead.

example: She has made great progress in English this term.
exampleCn: 这学期她的英语取得了很大进步。

example: A narrow path leads to the top of the hill.
exampleCn: 一条狭窄的小路通向山顶。

example: His first reaction to the news was complete surprise.
exampleCn: 他对这个消息的第一反应是十分惊讶。

example: A large crowd gathered outside the theater before the show.

example: The old church holds a Christian service every Sunday.

example: The board will appoint a new manager next month.
exampleCn: 董事会下个月将任命一位新经理。

example: I was merely asking a question, not complaining.
exampleCn: 我只是问个问题，并不是在抱怨。

example: They rent a small apartment near the subway station.
exampleCn: 他们在地铁站附近租了一间小公寓。

example: She is always willing to help her classmates.
exampleCn: 她总是乐意帮助同学。

example: Regular exercise keeps you healthy and full of energy.
exampleCn: 规律的锻炼让你健康而充满活力。

example: Click the link to open the official website.
exampleCn: 点击链接打开官方网站。

example: The teacher wrote a kind comment on my essay.
exampleCn: 老师在我的作文上写了一句友善的评语。

example: The rent is due at the beginning of each month.
exampleCn: 房租在每月月初到期应付。

example: The content of this book is suitable for beginners.
exampleCn: 这本书的内容很适合初学者。

example: He spent five years in prison for the crime.
exampleCn: 他因这一罪行在监狱里服刑五年。

example: After the experiment, we reached a clear conclusion.
exampleCn: 实验结束后，我们得出了明确的结论。

example: The chief of the village welcomed the visitors warmly.
exampleCn: 村长热情地欢迎来访者。

example: A guard stands at the gate all night long.
exampleCn: 一名守卫整夜站在大门口。

example: I sent her an email but got no reply.
exampleCn: 我给她发了邮件，但没有收到回复。

example: The reporter interviewed the mayor about the new policy.
exampleCn: 记者就新政策采访了市长。

example: The court promised justice for the victim's family.
exampleCn: 法院承诺为受害者家属伸张正义。

example: The company can deliver the package within two days.
exampleCn: 这家公司能在两天内送达包裹。

example: Scientists observe the stars through powerful telescopes.
exampleCn: 科学家通过高倍望远镜观察星空。

example: A hammer is a useful tool for every home.
exampleCn: 锤子是每个家庭都用得上的工具。

example: Nothing could shake her belief in herself.
exampleCn: 什么也动摇不了她对自己的信念。

example: Wild flowers grow along the mountain road in spring.
exampleCn: 春天，野花沿着山路盛开。

example: Every vehicle must stop at the red light.
exampleCn: 每辆车都必须在红灯前停下。

example: They decided to settle in a quiet coastal town.
exampleCn: 他们决定在一个安静的海滨小镇定居。

example: Don't ignore the warning signs on the beach.
exampleCn: 不要忽视海滩上的警示标志。

example: The sunrise over the sea is a beautiful sight.
exampleCn: 海上日出是一道美丽的景观。

example: The average temperature here in July is about thirty degrees.
exampleCn: 这里七月的平均气温大约是三十度。

example: He made a fortune in the real estate business.
exampleCn: 他在房地产生意中发了大财。

example: They shared a bottle of red wine at dinner.
exampleCn: 晚餐时他们一起喝了一瓶红葡萄酒。

example: Under her strong leadership, the company grew very quickly.
exampleCn: 在她有力的领导下，公司发展非常迅速。

example: He works two jobs to earn money for his family.
exampleCn: 他打两份工为家人挣钱。

example: I propose that we start the meeting earlier tomorrow.
exampleCn: 我提议明天的会议早一点开始。

example: The hotel charges an additional fee for breakfast.
exampleCn: 这家酒店的早餐要额外收费。

example: The doctor took a blood sample for testing.
exampleCn: 医生取了血样进行化验。

example: The package will possibly arrive tomorrow morning.
exampleCn: 包裹可能明天早上送到。

example: Fresh air and exercise contribute to good health.
exampleCn: 新鲜空气和锻炼有助于身体健康。

example: A tiny insect landed on the white flower.
exampleCn: 一只小小的昆虫落在白花上。

example: My grandmother stays active by walking every morning.
exampleCn: 我祖母每天早晨散步，保持活力。

example: Don't forget to feed the cat before you leave.
exampleCn: 离开前别忘了喂猫。

example: Her employer offered her a raise last month.
exampleCn: 上个月她的雇主给她加了薪。

example: He worked hard for years to pay off his debt.
exampleCn: 他辛苦工作多年来还清债务。

example: The police checked the identity of every passenger.
exampleCn: 警察核查了每位乘客的身份。

example: Our main objective is to improve product quality.
exampleCn: 我们的主要目标是提高产品质量。

example: The project's success was largely due to teamwork.
exampleCn: 这个项目的成功在很大程度上归功于团队合作。

example: The audience was mostly young people and students.
exampleCn: 观众大部分是年轻人和学生。

example: I will arrange a meeting with the client for Friday.
exampleCn: 我会安排周五与客户见面。

example: Some plants can survive in the dry desert.
exampleCn: 有些植物能在干旱的沙漠中存活。

example: She never lost faith in her son's ability.
exampleCn: 她从未对儿子的能力失去信心。

example: The company will promote the new product on television.
exampleCn: 公司将在电视上宣传推广新产品。

example: He makes a living by teaching music to children.
exampleCn: 他靠教孩子们音乐谋生。

example: Let's count the votes before announcing the winner.
exampleCn: 在宣布获胜者之前，我们先来计票。

example: The farmer gets up early to milk the cows.
exampleCn: 农夫每天早起给奶牛挤奶。

example: He missed the whole season because of a knee injury.
exampleCn: 他因膝伤缺席了整个赛季。

example: A package arrived for you early this morning.
exampleCn: 今天一早有一个你的包裹送到了。

example: The task was hard; nevertheless, they finished it on time.
exampleCn: 任务很艰巨，然而他们还是按时完成了。
